LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT NEUTRON HOLDINGS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAINTAIN ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION UNDER CCP 437C(P)(2). (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO MAINTAIN ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION PER CCP 437C(P)(2) AS IT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE ADDUCED RELEASE/LIMITATION OF LIABILITY CLAUSE IS ENFORCEABLE. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CONSUELO CHAVEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF DEFENDANT LIME'S PERSON MOST QUALIFIED is adopted as follows: Motion to compel GRANTED as follows. Lime's PMQ must be produced once an appropriate protective order is entered - as discussed by the order entered by JPT Van Zandt.

The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Borrowman at: sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plt Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Ccsf Person Most Qualified
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Atty. Elizabeth Williams, Esq. of Skane Mills LLP (Tel. 415.431.4150) for the Defendant City and County of San Francisco;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CONSUELO CHAVEZ' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant CCSF's Person Most Qualified.

Ms. Williams stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, counsel for CCSF (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Discussions/argument held. At the conclusion of discussions/argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Motion to compel GRANTED as follows. CCSF's PMQ must be produced once an appropriate protective order is entered - as discussed by the order entered by JPT Van Zandt.

Ms. Williams is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Borrowman at: sborrowman@gmail.com.
